slides.content:
PROMOTIONAL MARKETING FLYER / POSTER for a school rewards app.

Brand: levelUp EDU
Tagline: Turn school behavior into an arcade adventure.

Subheadline: PBIS made fun — students earn points, unlock levels, and redeem epic rewards.

Hero visual: playful arcade cabinet, glowing coins, trophy, student ID card, and prize shop icons floating around a central glass 3D logo.

Call to action badge: Get Started Today
Footer line: Cloud-powered · Works on any device · Built for K–12 schools

Color mood: fuchsia, violet, cyan neon accents on dark premium background — match a modern gaming / ed-tech product.

FLYER BACK / FEATURES PANEL for levelUp EDU

Headline: Everything your school needs to level up

Feature cards (icon + short label each):
1. Student Kiosk — Scan ID, redeem coupons, check points
2. Teacher Station — Print reward coupons in seconds
3. Prize Shop — Students redeem points for real prizes
4. Admin Portal — Manage students, teachers, prizes & backups
5. Hall of Fame — Celebrate top point earners
6. Barcode & NFC Login — Fast check-in at any station

Bottom banner: Positive behavior support that students actually love.
Contact strip: levelUp EDU · portal.yourdomain.com/your-school
